/usr/local/cuda/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler  --generate-code=arch=compute_80,code=[compute_80,sm_80] -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink CMakeFiles/dsm_global_array_demo.dir/examples/global_array_demo.cu.o CMakeFiles/dsm_global_array_demo.dir/src/dummy.cu.o -o CMakeFiles/dsm_global_array_demo.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  /usr/local/nvshmem/lib/libnvshmem_device.a /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a  -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
